mapper.select:
SELECT tcp.post_no AS postNo, tcp.user_no AS userNo, tcp.post_title AS postTitle, tcp.user_nickname AS userNickname, tcp.post_date AS postDate, tcp.post_view_count AS postViewCount, ( SELECT COUNT(post_like_no) FROM tbl_post_like tpl WHERE tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no ) AS likeCount FROM tbl_community_post tcp
tcp.post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
tcp.user_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY tcp.post_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_community_post tcp
tcp.post_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
tcp.user_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT tcp.post_no AS postNo, tcp.user_no AS userNo, tcp.post_title AS postTitle, tcp.user_nickname AS userNickname, tcp.post_date AS postDate, tcp.post_content AS postContent, tcp.post_view_count AS postViewCount, ( SELECT COUNT(post_like_no) FROM tbl_post_like tpl WHERE tpl.post_no = tcp.post_no ) AS likeCount, tpi.post_img_system_name AS postImgSystemName, tpi.post_img_origin_name AS postImgOriginName FROM tbl_community_post tcp LEFT JOIN tbl_post_image tpi ON tpi.post_no = tcp.post_no WHERE tcp.post_no = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_community_post SET post_title = #{postTitle}, post_content = #{postContent}, user_nickname = #{userNickname}, post_date = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
